seoDescription: Klein ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 13 first day, May 28 last day, fall break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break and ICS.
calendarNotes: Klein ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 13, 2025 and ends on May 28, 2026. Fall Break runs October 13-17, Thanksgiving Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Mid-Winter Break runs February 9-13, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. No official 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided, so this record cites the official Klein ISD calendar page and uses the locally supplied calendar PDF for date extraction.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Klein ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 13, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Klein ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Klein ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Thursday, May 28, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Why is there no 2025-2026 PDF link?
calendarFaqs.a: No official 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided. The date record cites the official Klein ISD calendar page and is based on the locally supplied calendar PDF.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 13, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is May 28, 2026.
